name: Biscuits with Ham Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt; set aside.
2. In another bowl, whisk together sour cream and egg until well combined.
3. Gradually stir the sour cream mixture into the dry ingredients until just moistened.
4. Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead gently 4 to 5 times.
5. Roll the dough to 1/2 inch thickness and cut with a 2-1/2 inch biscuit cutter.
6. Place the biscuits on a greased baking sheet.
7. Bake at 425°F for 10 to 12 minutes, or until lightly browned.
8. Meanwhile, process ham in a blender or food processor until finely minced.
9. Add butter and continue processing until well mixed.
10. Spread the ham butter mixture over warm biscuits before serving.
Source: Taste of Home
